name: execute_query
description: Executes a read-only GraphQL query to fetch data from Buffer. PREREQUISITE: Call introspect_schema first to learn available queries and fields. Use this only for operations not covered by domain tools (get_account, list_channels, get_channel). Do not guess query or field names — use only names from the schema.

summary.description: A brief, non-technical description of what this operation does and why. This is shown to users in permission prompts to help them understand the action.

query.description: The GraphQL query to execute. Field and type names MUST match the schema returned by introspect_schema.

variables.description: Variables for the query as a JSON object.

operationName.description: Name of the specific query to run if multiple are defined.
